name: airo-bots
description: AIRO BOTS - AI & Robotics Educational Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run --prefix backend prisma:generate && npm run --prefix backend prisma:push && npm run --prefix backend prisma:seed
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.dev: node scripts/killPorts.js && concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
